description: Compact party toolkit — role/stats/signature_moves/turn/resources. Scannable in 5 seconds.
last_updated: session_4 — Level 4 + Wave Echo Cave + Forge of Spells upgrades

signature_moves: Trip Attack → hit +1d8 extra + STR DC14 or prone; prone = melee advantage for Bron/Dain follow-up
Goading Attack → hit +1d8 extra + WIS DC14 or disadvantage on all attacks except vs Honu
Riposte → reaction on enemy miss: counterattack +8 hit, 1d8+6+1d8 damage
Shell Defense → action: AC 25, prone, speed 0, adv STR/CON saves — chokepoint blocker or last resort

turn.action: Longsword +2 (+8/1d8+6) — lead with Trip Attack on key enemy
turn.bonus_action: Second Wind (1d10+4 self-heal) or enter Shell Defense
turn.reaction: Protection (impose disadv on attack vs adjacent ally) or Riposte (on enemy miss)

resources.action_surge: 1/short rest (double Trip to prone two enemies)

signature_moves: Charge → move 30ft straight, hit, then bonus Hooves attack (1d4+6 bludgeoning)
Improved Critical → crit on 19-20; with Action Surge = 4 attack rolls at crit range
Boots of Speed → double move 1/day 10min (40ft→80ft); close on priority targets or escape
Action Surge → extra action 1/short rest — use when enemy is prone or Bless is active for max crit odds

turn.bonus_action: Hooves after Charge (1d4+6), or Second Wind (1d10+4)

raistlin-high-elf-wizard.role: Battlefield control / Portent guarantor / utility (School of Divination)
signature_moves: Portent → replace ANY roll with pre-rolled d20 (2/long rest, declare before roll) — guarantee Web/Hold Person lands or turn a hit into a miss
Web → DEX DC14 or restrained in 20ft cube, concentration — best opener vs groups; restrained = disadv attacks, adv against them
Hold Person → WIS DC14 paralyze humanoid, concentration — all hits vs paralyzed target = auto-crit
Faerie Fire → advantage for entire party on affected targets, 60ft cube — stack with Trip/prone for max crit rate

turn.action: Web or Hold Person (use Portent to guarantee) — or cantrip: Fire Bolt +6/1d10 fire, Toll the Dead 1d8/1d12 vs injured targets
turn.bonus_action: Misty Step (teleport 30ft, no concentration) for escape or repositioning
turn.reaction: Shield via Staff (2 charges → AC 26) or Absorb Elements (halve elemental/breath damage)

resources.staff_of_defense: 10 charges (1d6+4 at dawn); Mage Armor 1 charge, Shield 2 charges
resources.wand_burning_phoenix: 7 charges (1d6+1 at dawn); Fireball 4d8 DC15 20ft radius — NOT yet attuned
resources.arcane_recovery: recover up to 2 spell levels on short rest, 1/long rest

signature_moves: Vow of Enmity + Divine Smite → bonus action advantage all attacks vs 1 target + 2d8 radiant on hit = avg 28 total; crit chance ~doubled
Thunderous Smite → bonus action concentration, next hit +2d6 thunder + STR DC13 or prone+pushed 10ft (sets up Bron melee advantage)
Bless → concentration +1d4 to all attack rolls and saves for 3 allies — DEFAULT concentration every fight
Abjure Enemy → action, WIS DC13 or frightened + speed 0 for 1 min; undead/fiends have disadvantage

turn.action: Blade of Drow Lord (+9/1d8+9) — add Divine Smite on hit by spending a spell slot (+2d8 radiant, +3d8 vs undead/fiends)
turn.bonus_action: Vow of Enmity (advantage vs priority target) or Thunderous Smite (prone setup)

resources.lay_on_hands: 20 HP pool/long rest (touch heal or cure poison/disease)

signature_moves: Assassinate → auto-crit on surprised targets; advantage vs creatures that haven't acted. Rapier crit: 4d8+7+4d6 avg 39 + Venom Fang bonus crit: 4d4+2+4d10 avg 34 = ~73 avg first strike
Ring of Spell Storing → activate Invisibility (Raistlin-loaded, 2nd) before combat for guaranteed Assassinate every fight
Venom Fang +2 → bonus action off-hand, 1d4+2 pierce + CON DC15 or 2d10 poison (1 poison charge/long rest)
Cunning Action → Hide/Dash/Disengage as bonus action every turn — reposition or vanish after each attack

turn.action: Rapier +2 (+9/1d8+7) + Sneak Attack 2d6 (requires advantage or adjacent ally)
turn.bonus_action: Venom Fang off-hand (1d4+2+2d10 poison) or Cunning Action (Hide/Dash/Disengage) or Ring spell

resources.ring_of_spell_storing: 5 levels capacity — load Invisibility (2nd) + Bless (1st) after each long rest

sweeney-human-cleric.role: Primary healer / support / aura buffer (Life Domain)

stats.aura: allies within 10ft: +1 AC, advantage on death saves (Cloak of Arcane Sentinel)

signature_moves: Healing Word → bonus action 1d4+8 avg 10 at 60ft — in-combat heal without spending main action
Spiritual Weapon → 2nd slot, bonus action 1d8+5 force each subsequent turn, NO concentration — free damage rider every round
Guiding Bolt → +7 hit, 4d6 radiant + advantage on next attacker — best Round 1 setup for Bron/Dain follow-up
Prayer of Healing → 10 min cast, 2d6+9 avg 16 to all party — full recovery between fights (Disciple of Life: +spell level bonus on all healing)

turn.action: Guiding Bolt (+7/4d6 radiant) or Light Crossbow +2 (+7/1d8+5) — or cast control/support spell
turn.bonus_action: Healing Word (1d4+8 at 60ft) or Spiritual Weapon (1d8+5 force, each turn after cast)

resources.channel_divinity_preserve_life: 20 HP distributed within 30ft/short rest (emergency mid-combat heal)
resources.prayer_of_healing: 2nd slot, 10 min cast, all party 2d6+9 avg 16 — use between encounters
resources.disciple_of_life: passive: +2+spell_level added to ALL healing spells

stats.contract: Active through Wave Echo Cave. Gets spellbook back + Forge access after.

signature_moves: Animate Dead → raise corpses as zombies (up to 7 total, 2/long rest)
Hold Person → WIS save or paralyze humanoid, concentration
Magic Missile → auto-hit 3d4+3, no save
Shield → reaction +5 AC

turn.action: Animate Dead or Hold Person or Magic Missile

resources.zombie_roster: 2 orc zombies active; 4 orc + 1 ogre pending (raise 2/long rest)

scrolls.name: Scroll of Planar Convergence
scrolls.effect: Teleport entire party up to 50 miles or between planes — EMERGENCY ONLY
